# attrSmimeCapabilities

**Type Property**

Identify signature, encryption, and digest algorithms supported by the encoder.

## Declaration

```swift
static var attrSmimeCapabilities: CMSSignedAttributes { get }
```

## Discussion

Using this attribute doesn’t change the encoding. See [https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2311] section 2.5.2 for more information about the capabilities attribute.
